events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求检查一个装配车间的扭矩和螺纹紧固工作，发现螺纹锁固剂颜色错用（蓝色 vs. 红色 - ID）。工作处于“rough-complete”阶段。根据OEM/工程规范，我们应该判断是否符合要求。

关键点：螺纹锁固剂颜色错用。通常，蓝色是中等强度，可拆卸；红色是高强度，永久锁固。错误使用可能导致紧固件松脱或拆卸困难。这显然是不符合规范的，因为使用了错误的材料。因此，决策应为“fail”。风险可能是“high”或“critical”，取决于应用。这里可能涉及安全关键紧固件，所以风险高。组件条件：installed-defective 和 non-compliant 都适用。工作阶段：rough-complete。百分比完成可以估计为90%（已安装但未最终检查）。value无要求。sound_source不相关。confidence高。event_time, rate不相关。order不相关。workable可能为空。findings和actions应具体。rationale简短解释。references可引用OEM规范。

我们给出JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Incorrect thread locker applied: blue used where red (high-strength) is specified per OEM/engineering specs"],
  "actions": ["Quarantine assembly", "Remove fasteners, clean threads, and reapply correct red thread locker per spec", "Re-torque and mark per quality procedure"],
  "rationale": "Thread locker color mismatch violates OEM/engineering requirements, risking joint integrity. Blue thread locker provides insufficient locking strength for this application.",
  "references": ["OEM assembly specification (thread locker requirement)", "Engineering drawing notes on fastener retention"]
}
